Name: FSkeletalMeshOptimizationSettings
Description: FSkeletalMeshOptimizationSettings - The settings used to optimize a skeletal mesh LOD.

Variables.Name: ReductionMethod
Variables.Description: The method to use when optimizing the skeletal mesh LOD

Variables.Name: NumOfTrianglesPercentage
Variables.Description: If ReductionMethod equals SMOT_NumOfTriangles this value is the ratio of triangles [0-1] to remove from the mesh

Variables.Name: MaxDeviationPercentage
Variables.Description: If ReductionMethod equals SMOT_MaxDeviation this value is the maximum deviation from the base mesh as a percentage of the bounding sphere.

Variables.Name: ScreenSize
Variables.Description: If ReductionMethod equals SMOT_ScreenSize this value is the screen size in pixel at which the LOD should be viewed

Variables.Name: WeldingThreshold
Variables.Description: The welding threshold distance. Vertices under this distance will be welded.

Variables.Name: bRecalcNormals
Variables.Description: Whether Normal smoothing groups should be preserved. If false then NormalsThreshold is used

Variables.Name: NormalsThreshold
Variables.Description:
If the angle between two triangles are above this value, the normals will not be
	smooth over the edge between those two triangles. Set in degrees. This is only used when PreserveNormals is set to false

Variables.Name: SilhouetteImportance
Variables.Description: How important the shape of the geometry is.

Variables.Name: BoneReductionRatio
Variables.Description: The ratio of bones that will be removed from the mesh

Variables.Name: MaxBonesPerVertex
Variables.Description: Maximum number of bones that can be assigned to each vertex.

Variables.Name: bTransferMorphTarget
Variables.Description: Specify if morph targets should be transfered to the LOD or not

Variables.Name: BaseLOD
Variables.Description: Index to which LOD model you want as source when generating the LOD

Variables.Name: bUseVertexWeights
Variables.Description:
Vertex colors are converted to weights. The weights are used
	- Red: Vertices will be less important

Variables.Name: bSimplifyMaterials
Variables.Description: Specify if material should be baked or not.

Variables.Name: bForceRebuild
Variables.Description: This is a transient property used to pass "force build" option from UI to FLODUtilities
